_metadata.description: Text translations for rflib package plot labels and chart elements

txt_avg_resp_rate_pct._comment_hu: Average response rate (%) - used in axis names and series names

txt_resp_count._comment_hu: Number of responses - used as series name

txt_resp_rate_pct._comment_hu: Response rate (%) - used in axis names

txt_resp_num._comment_hu: Number of responses - used in axis labels

txt_avg_prefix._comment_hu: Average: - used as prefix in labels

txt_median_prefix._comment_hu: Median: - used as prefix in labels

txt_answer._comment_hu: Answer - used in axis labels and legends

txt_avg_answers._comment_hu: Average answers - used in ggplot y-axis

txt_avg_resp_rate._comment_hu: Average response rate (without %) - used in ggplot y-axis

txt_respondent_count._comment_hu: Number of respondents - used in ggplot size aesthetic

txt_resp_rate_count._comment_hu: Response rate (count) - used in ggplot x-axis

txt_middle_values._comment_hu: Middle values - used in ggplot color aesthetic

txt_bubble_caption.hu:
A válaszok nagysága arányos az említéseik számával
 Csak a kettőnél többször említett válaszok vannak megjelenítve
txt_bubble_caption._comment_hu: Bubble chart caption explaining size proportionality
txt_bubble_caption.en:
The size of responses is proportional to their mentions
 Only responses mentioned more than twice are displayed

txt_resp_rate._comment_hu: Response rate - used in axis labels
